description: Style NoteA brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this Polo neck T- Shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with sandals and distressed denims for a day out with friends.Product DetailsTurquoise Blue polo neck T-shirt, rib knit spread collar, short sleeves with rib knit binding, short three button placket, vented hem, branding applique on left chestMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldIron on reverseSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
